title: PM Approval Workpackage Review Drillthrough
objective: Add frontend-only workpackage-review drillthrough from the PM approval detail screen into existing promoted PM tracer, schedule, drivers, and variance routes using the focused workpackage task while preserving scoped workpackage decision-history context, return-path conventions, and mutation guardrails.
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 012 remains the deployment gate for hosted mutation-seam parity and live PM proof.

Read-only scout 019e2c9c-dd6b-7023-b474-3338413b5906 confirmed the smallest workpackage-review slice is to reuse existing approval callbacks, keep history scoped to the workpackage id, and prove focused-task selection.
Coordinator execution kept write ownership local to the PM approval frontend and focused approval-context smoke while using the scout as the parallel orchestration lane.
constrained_outputs: WorkPackageReview accepts the same onTraceTask, onViewSchedule, onViewDrivers, and onViewVariance callbacks used by task, snapshot, and escalation flows.
Workpackage review renders a Related Task Actions card when a focused workpackage task exists.
The focused workpackage task uses the existing pickFocusedTask rule: first non-complete task, then first task fallback.
Workpackage-review drillthrough preserves the workpackage return-path context through buildPmReturnContext.

Focused Playwright proof adds a workpackage-review deep link with complete task first and active task second, asserts scoped workpackage history, asserts the compact history context, verifies all action controls, and proves tracer handoff plus return link.
Existing escalation, snapshot, and task approval-context proofs remain intact.
validation_steps: CI=1 corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.approval-context.smoke.spec.ts
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-017 is frontend-only and does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, auth widening, ingress widening, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, Vercel promotion, or Render deployment action.
